# Change routing

Find the change-type that matches your task and follow that row before editing.

## 加 / 改 CLI 命令
- Read first: `src/cli.ts`, `src/commands`
- Entry points: `src/cli.ts`
- Do NOT assume: 用户可见输出走 util 的 ok/err/warn/info（ASCII，无 emoji）
- Minimum verification: `typecheck`

## 改 manifest schema
- Read first: `src/manifest.ts`, `SPEC-v0.md`
- Entry points: `src/manifest.ts`
- Do NOT assume: schema 改动要同步 SPEC-v0.md + examples/ 三个样板，否则 doctor 漂移
- Minimum verification: `typecheck`

## 改生成模板
- Read first: `src/render.ts`
- Entry points: `src/render.ts`
- Do NOT assume: AGENTS.md 有体量预算（150 行 / 700 词），细节下沉到 .agents/
- Minimum verification: `typecheck`

## 加 / 改测试
- Read first: `test`, `src`
- Entry points: `test`
- Do NOT assume: 单测用 node:test + tsx，勿引入 jest/vitest（反仪式、少依赖）
- Minimum verification: `test`, `typecheck`
